sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90517" key="proth/nion" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προτήνιον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡλικία τις αἰγός· ἐν Καμειρέων ἱεροποίᾳ τράγον π. θύειν νόμος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πρατήνιον, πρητήν</foreign>.</entryFree>
